Gemma 3 Linux server offline bundle sources

1. GGUF model
- Source registry: https://registry.ollama.ai/v2/library/gemma3/manifests/1b-it-qat
- Model digest: sha256:57c9b4a897df8d1ba26a152eb7b98e8dc743e21a5d5492f8183270565b84932b
- Assembled SHA256: 57c9b4a897df8d1ba26a152eb7b98e8dc743e21a5d5492f8183270565b84932b

2. llama.cpp runtime
- Release: b8740
- Asset: llama-b8740-bin-ubuntu-x64.tar.gz
- URL: https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b8740/llama-b8740-bin-ubuntu-x64.tar.gz
- SHA256: aa06af98d4588248e3480acda2eca2daaf49867a42fd0c114c67cb618b39b203

3. Bundled C++ runtime for RHEL 9.2 compatibility
- Package: libstdcxx 14.3.0 (Anaconda linux-64)
- Artifact: libstdcxx-14.3.0-h39759b7_4.tar.bz2
- URL: https://repo.anaconda.com/pkgs/main/linux-64/libstdcxx-14.3.0-h39759b7_4.tar.bz2
- Bundled file: vendor/runtime/lib/libstdc++.so.6
- Bundled SHA256: bcb1a2e57f3efacc46bd7cd7eec003cd21689a8865250167aa0aafc31675b03a
